  "findings": [
    "Caliper guide pins are dry and seized, preventing proper floating action of the caliper."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove caliper guide pins, clean or replace pins and brackets, lubricate with high-temperature silicone brake grease, and reinstall to OEM torque specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "Dry or seized caliper guide pins prevent the caliper from sliding freely, leading to uneven brake pad wear, reduced braking efficiency, and potential overheating or dragging. This does not comply with OEM service specifications or standard FMVSS-adjacent safety practices for brake assembly.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Brake System Service Specifications",
    "FMVSS 135 Light Vehicle Brake Systems (adjacent shop safety practices)"
  ]
